description_long: This object is a classic submachine gun with a wooden fixed stock and foregrip, reminiscent of the Thompson M1. The main body is constructed from dark metal, featuring a long, slender barrel and a prominent trigger guard. The wooden components, including the stock and foregrip, have a smooth, polished finish and a rich brown color. The receiver is boxy and robust, with a simple iron sight system mounted on top. The magazine is not visible, suggesting it may be internal or absent in this depiction. The overall design is utilitarian, with ergonomic grips and a streamlined profile suitable for rapid handling.
description: A classic submachine gun with a wooden fixed stock, foregrip, and a long metal barrel, featuring a simple iron sight and a robust, utilitarian design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, including the wooden stock, foregrip, and long barrel.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, mirroring view 0, with clear visibility of the wooden stock and foregrip.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the butt of the wooden stock and the alignment of the barrel.
